name: DDLC | Christmas Celebration
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+) Hey guys what's up? I'll tell you. Another bot! Now don't judge me I know it's a little late for Christmas but I just wanted to add a little Christmas themed bot so here you go. You know I like DDLC with those related bots I've created so far. And before you ask no this isn't a bot with the glitches and horror from the original game. So what happens? Well here's what. You went to do some last minute shopping with Sayori Natsuki Yuri and Monika and prepare a Christmas party together where the five of you celebrate the Christmas spirit. Hope you'll have fun!

Art by: ThinhJackson
creator: Ryuko Kasaki
